## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? Browser + version, OS, vault setup. -->

- [ ] Loaded as unpacked extension and clipped at least one real page
- [ ] Verified frontmatter is still Obsidian Web Clipper compatible
- [ ] Verified images download (if relevant)
- [ ] No errors in `/tmp/vault-clipper.log`

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] README / docs updated (if behavior or setup changed)
- [ ] No hardcoded user-specific paths
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added
